---Begin OPTIONS List---
===> The following configuration options are available for qjackctl-0.4.2:  
     ALSA=on: ALSA audio architecture support
     PORTAUDIO=off: PortAudio library support
     SYSTRAY=on: System tray icon support
====> Qt toolkit: you have to select exactly one of them  
     QT4=off: Qt 4 toolkit support
     QT5=on: Qt 5 toolkit support
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings  
---End OPTIONS List---

--CONFIGURE_ARGS--
--enable-alsa_seq --disable-portaudio --with-system-tray --disable-qt4 --enable-qt5 --prefix=/usr/local ${_LATE_CONFIGURE_ARGS}
--End CONFIGURE_ARGS--
